_doc: AUTHORITATIVE RELEASE-STATE CONTRACT (final integration 2026-07-21, integration/v2.11-final-rc). Binds the config identity together with the release identities, the owner-approved switch posture, the PVC provenance and the must-be-unset override hooks. Loaded + fail-closed in a canonical build (release_contract.verify). PROVISIONAL final-RC; no tag/deploy/canonical-score authorised.

present_lens_baseline.note: ITEM 408 STOP-1 (owner-approved 2026-07-22): balanced/strict reference advanced 06d8af60->1373e824; present_value_total is the R19 candidate present-v sum (build-and-compare = data/rl_build/rl_app_data.json md5 6f07f7cb, 0 movers). Corrects the prior 757608 (that value added the +5181 D8 present-board delta to the FV present-lens baseline 752427 instead of the correction's present baseline 755072; the present_board_correction/summary.json present_total_after is 760253). Board of record 6f07f7cb is NOT replaced; forward-lens repair deferred.

f5_entrant_reconciliation.canonical_build: rl_export.py RL_LEGF=1 (Option A: engine emits the ladder)

season_metadata.as_of_round_source: DYNAMIC weekly stamp (expected_boot + this contract + board-view stamp); advanced by the Track B updater; feeds NO valuation math
season_metadata.rl_season_rounds_role: RL_SEASON_ROUNDS / DEFAULT_SEASON_ROUNDS=24 = ingestion round-bound SANITY guard ONLY (round_apply.py:52,290-295); NOT a valuation input; class B (infra); lives in the gated-OFF store-write path
season_metadata.coherence: season_prog 0.58 agrees with as_of_round/season_total = 14/24 = 0.583 by convention at the release
season_metadata.class: A (live valuation semantics): calendar_progress + exposure_pace are DERIVED dynamic release state that FEED the valuation, stamped via rl_model+board md5 + the season_state derivation; as_of_round is the dynamic round stamp; RL_SEASON_ROUNDS is class-B ingestion infra (never a valuation input).
season_metadata.note: calendar_progress + exposure_pace are DERIVED (season_state.json); RL_M3_FE/RL_EXPO_F removed from config; derivation policy immutable (derivation_policy_id).
season_metadata.calendar_progress_derivation: round_half_up(100*as_of_round/season_total_rounds)/100 in season_state.py (policy immutable, hashed by derivation_policy_id). Consumed everywhere the engine formerly read the frozen SEASON_PROG literal + RL_M3_FE (both removed). DERIVED + advances weekly; FEEDS the valuation.
season_metadata.exposure_pace_derivation: round(median(current games of the durable population, prior>=18)/22, 3), cap 1.0; per-player scope s=clip(1-g/11,0,1). Freshly DERIVED from the staged store each round; replaces RL_EXPO_F.
season_metadata.coupling_finding: as_of_round (dynamic weekly) and the valuation season fraction are now COUPLED: the weekly updater DERIVES + ADVANCES calendar_progress and exposure_pace from the staged store each accepted round and commits them atomically with the store/board/expected_boot/contract. Round progression drives valuation progression; there is no frozen SEASON_PROG and nothing is deferred.
